summary: The diff shows only minor documentation and metadata updates (frontend file summaries, HTML metadata, project state tracking). There is no evidence of actual deployment configuration, canister deployment scripts, dfx.json mainnet configuration, Internet Identity mainnet integration, or any deployment-related code changes that would fulfill REQ-9's requirement to deploy to Internet Computer mainnet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deploy the application to the Internet Computer mainnet so it is publicly accessible with a production canister URL
missing_requirements.reason: No deployment configuration, dfx.json mainnet settings, deployment scripts, or canister deployment evidence found in the diff. Only metadata and documentation files were modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: All canisters (frontend and backend) are running on mainnet
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of canister deployment configuration or mainnet network settings. No dfx.json changes or deployment commands visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Application is accessible via a public canister URL
missing_requirements.reason: No deployment output, canister IDs, or public URL configuration present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Internet Identity authentication works with mainnet deployment
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to authentication configuration for mainnet Internet Identity integration. No environment-specific configuration updates visible.

hallucinated_features.description: Addition of production-ready metadata including description and theme color in HTML
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states non-goals include 'Modifying any application features or UI' and constraints require 'Must maintain all existing functionality during deployment'. Adding meta tags for description and theme-color are UI/feature modifications not requested.
